ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "iters" INTEGER /* Number of iterations completed */,
  "res" REAL /* Result of the optimization process */,
  "f" REAL /* Function value at the current iteration */,
  "t_f" REAL /* Temperature factor used in the optimization */,
  "damp" REAL /* Damping factor applied during the optimization */,
  "objs" REAL /* Objective value computed at the current iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, failed, in-progress) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time consumed by the experiment */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metadata" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment (foreign key from optimization_results) */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment and its objectives */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the experiment (e.g., machine learning, deep learning) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment (e.g., research, production) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the experiment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment (foreign key from experiment_metadata) */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_history" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment (foreign key from optimization_results) */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the experiment at that iteration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "iteration")
)
